consignor.certificate_value: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB C/O Greencarrier AB Box 1076 40522, Göteborg Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB Torgny Segerstedtsgatan 80 Gothenburg 40522 Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'SOIC Trade and Logistics AB' from the certificate matches the invoice issuer after allowed normalization including ignoring 'C/O Greencarrier AB', verifying presence in invoice header and address. Country 'Sweden' matches exactly. Therefore, consignor is verified with MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V. Prolongación 27 Calle, Contiguo a Z Astro Honduras, Co. Felipe Zelaya San Pedro Sula 21101 Honduras
consignee.invoice_value: Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V. Prolongación 27 Calle, Contiguo a Zona Libre Astro Honduras, Co. Felipe Zelaya San Pedro Sula 21101 Honduras
consignee.motivation: Consignee name and address in certificate 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.' matches invoice consignee 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.' with allowed normalization including expansion of 'Contiguo a Z' to 'Contiguo a Zona Libre'. The invoice's 'Invoice to' field matches the consignee. Country 'Honduras' matches exactly. Thus, consignee is verified with MATCH.

goods_description.invoice_value: Testliner 2 BW 170gsm, RW 1300mm; Testliner 2 BW 170gsm, RW 1350mm; Testliner 2 BW 170gsm, RW 1450mm; Testliner 2 BW 170gsm, RW 1600mm; Testliner 2 BW 170gsm, RW 1700mm
goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate 'TESTLINER HS CODE 4805 25 ROLLS' matches items in invoice description 'Testliner 2' variants with HS code 4805 25. The invoice includes detailed grades matching the certificate's description. No contradictions found. Article numbers not explicitly present but HS code confirms product category. Thus, goods description verified as MATCH.

quantity.motivation: Quantity in certificate is 52.992 MT but invoice total quantity is 55.348 MT for 30 rolls. The quantities do not match within allowed tolerances. No exception or summation rule applies. Therefore, a MISMATCH is reported for quantity.

origin.motivation: Origin in certificate 'EU GERMANY' is verified in invoice with explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN. GERMANY'. EU-normalization rule applies allowing 'EU' and 'GERMANY' as matching origin. Thus, origin is verified as MATCH.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points except quantity match between certificate and invoice. Quantity differs (52.992 MT vs 55.348 MT), causing overall NOT_IDENTICAL result.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Kvantiiteten i certifikatet (52.992 MT) skiljer sig från fakturans kvantitet (55.348 MT). Övriga kontrollpunkter stämmer och verifieringen kräver manuell hantering.
